title: Digital Operational Resilience Act (DORA)
summary: EU regulation establishing uniform requirements for digital operational resilience of financial entities. Covers ICT risk management, incident reporting, testing, third-party risk, and information sharing.

key_requirements.title: ICT risk management framework
key_requirements.description: Financial entities must have sound, comprehensive ICT risk management framework

key_requirements.title: Business continuity and disaster recovery
key_requirements.description: Comprehensive business continuity policy and disaster recovery plans for ICT systems

key_requirements.title: ICT-related incident reporting
key_requirements.description: Report major ICT-related incidents to competent authorities within strict timelines

key_requirements.title: Digital operational resilience testing
key_requirements.description: Regular testing of ICT systems including threat-led penetration testing

key_requirements.title: Third-party ICT service provider management
key_requirements.description: Comprehensive framework for managing ICT third-party risk

engineering_implications.description: Implement comprehensive security controls, monitoring, and incident response
Establish regular security testing program including penetration testing
Maintain detailed logs of all ICT incidents and security events
Design resilient architecture with redundancy and failover capabilities
